events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Verdict: **fail** — conductors crossing the bus gutter space instead of being routed through the dedicated side/top/bottom gutters is a common shortcut, not acceptable practice. It risks insulation abrasion against bus edges, crowds required wire-bending space (Art. 408), and can improperly co-mingle grounded conductors (200.4). Called for rework (reroute through proper gutters, restore bend space, verify 200.4 grouping) before the panel is closed up and energized, while unrelated tasks (breaker install, labeling, unaffected terminations) can continue.
